primary.description: Deep Corporate Navy for trust, authority, and primary structural elements.

secondary.description: Emerald Green for CTA, kinetic triggers, and financial success metrics.

layout.spacing_scale: generous for marketing (p-8 to p-24), dense for dashboard (p-4 to p-6)
layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Use border-collapse styles or subtle 1px borders (border-slate-200) without drop shadows to maintain a clean, objective financial tool appearance. No soft shadows.
layout.dashboard_grid: The 'Control Room' grid. Tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). High data density for tables and metrics.
layout.marketing_grid: Bento or Swiss layout with generous spacing and asymmetry.

components.buttons: Slightly rounded (rounded-md). Solid high-contrast backgrounds (Deep Navy or Emerald). Hover states must be explicitly lighter/darker.
components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-slate-200), no shadow by default. Hover: slight shadow-sm. Use Cardless approaches where data is tabular.
components.tables: Dense styling. Left-align text, right-align financial numbers (GBP £). Sticky headers for long run history.
components.forms: Left-aligned labels. Input borders are 1px solid slate-200. Focus state: ring-2 ring-emerald-500/50.
components.tabs: Clean underline or pill style. Use heavily in the Allocation Detail page.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D glassmorphic geometric shapes representing financial data and growth. Use in the landing page hero section. Add a dark overlay or gradient if text needs contrast.

auth_background.description: Minimalist abstract financial transaction network visualization. Use as the split-screen background for Sign In / Sign Up pages.

finance_lifestyle.description: A professional analyzing financial charts. Use in the landing page feature section or 'About' block.

logo_mark.description: Abstract blue and green logo mark. Use sparingly next to the 'EB Business Solutions' text logo if an icon is strictly needed.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: NOTE: The environment uses Javascript (.js/.jsx), NOT Typescript. Do not create .ts or .tsx files.
MUST use pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/landing pages, leveraging generous spacing.
MUST use Shadcn components heavily customized for the Dashboard, focusing on data density (Control Room Grid).
Implement standard B2B custom email/password JWT auth flow.
Dashboard page needs allocation runs table + summary stats.
Multi-step wizard for New Allocation (Details -> Bank CSV -> Invoice CSV -> Validate -> Run).
Allocation Detail page: MUST use a 5-tab layout (Full Match, Partial, Unmatched Bank, Unmatched Invoice, Audit Log) with manual override capabilities and CSV export.
Compare view: Create a multi-period compare view with debtor x run heat-matrix, color-coded badges, and a Consistently Unmatched banner.
Debtor Report page: Threshold flag input, 4 stat cards, expandable rows with per-run breakdown, and CSV export.
Audit Trail page: Sidebar with stat cards and run-id filter.
Use data-testid attributes extensively as per instructions.
Mock backend API calls with standard JS promises for CSV parsing and matching simulation until backend is ready.
